message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Secure Map Reduce 2 – Shuffle Service Token Flow

participant "Client\n(c)" as c
participant "Resource Manager\n(rm)" as rm
participant "Node Manager\n(nm)" as nm
participant "Shuffle Handler\n(ss)" as ss
participant "File System\n(fs)" as fs

== Bootstrap ==
activate nm
deactivate nm

== Job Definition ==
c -> rm: 1 createJob [...] ()\n: job-id
activate c
c <- c: createShuffleToken\n2 ( shfl-tkn-mk )\n: shfl-tkn
c <- c: serializeTokens\n3 ( shfl-tkn, ... )\n: c-tokens{shfl-tkn,...}
deactivate c

== Job Submission ==
c -> rm: submitApplication\n4 [...]\n( job-id, c-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ... )\n: app-rpt{clnt-tkn}

== Job Initiation ==
rm -> nm: startContainer\n5 [...]\n( c-tokens{shfl-tkn},svc-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ... )
activate nm
nm -> ss: 6 initApp\n( job-id, shfl-tkn )
activate ss
ss -> am: 7 exec
activate "Application Master\n(am)" as am
am -> nm: startContainer\n8 [...]\n( svc-tokens{shfl-tkn}, ... )
nm -> ac: 9 exec
activate "Application Container\n(ac)" as ac
ac -> t: 10 exec
activate "Task\n(t)" as t

== Map Task Execution ==
t -> fs: 11 writeShuffleData[]():

== Reduce Task Execution ==
ss -> t: 12 readShuffleData [SDT:shfl-tkn] (...): shfl-data
ss -> fs: 13 readShuffleData
fs --> ss: 14 shfl-data

== Job Completion ==
deactivate t
deactivate ac
deactivate am
deactivate ss
deactivate nm

@enduml
```
